parameters.label: Pit Loss Time
parameters.source: Per-circuit from Pirelli data (pit lane length × speed limit)

parameters.label: Safety Car Probability
parameters.source: Bayesian posterior from historical SC events per circuit (models/safety_car_priors.json)

parameters.label: Tyre Wear Curve Steepness
parameters.source: Fitted constant — controls cliff severity in tyre_deg = rate×age + 0.002×age^1.3

parameters.label: Tyre Wear Exponent
parameters.source: Fitted constant — controls non-linearity of tyre cliff (1.0=linear, 2.0=quadratic)

parameters.label: Fuel Weight Penalty
parameters.source: F1 consensus ~0.03-0.04s per kg (FIA technical regs, Scarbs F1 analysis)

parameters.label: SC Pace Multiplier
parameters.source: SC lap times ~40% slower than race pace (FIA regulations, delta time system)

parameters.label: SC Pit Time Saving
parameters.source: Under SC, pit loss reduced ~50% due to compressed field (varies by pit lane length)

parameters.label: Lap Time Variability
parameters.source: Std dev of lap-to-lap noise from traffic, driver variation, track evolution
